name: aind
description: AI-Native Dev flow for Azure DevOps, with pull requests on GitHub or Azure DevOps Repos (pluggable code host). Agents for onboarding, intake (readiness scoring), planning (delivers an implementation plan as a pull request), and implementation (builds an approved plan into a code PR, drives an independent code review to a verdict, then closes out on merge with the terminal status), plus a dreaming phase that synthesises the flow's lessons-learned into proposed .claude config improvements as a human-gated PR — plus the shared, scripted ADO/GitHub mechanics they rely on.
